name_en: LE 5À7 Series New Trendy Bucket Bag with Handle_ New shape, made of Italian calfskin. The clean, structured silhouette looks structured yet not too sharp. Features a metal foot at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. Overall, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic elegant and very modern!
